title: Managing Director, Asia-Pacific Corporate Function Coordination Department
description:
Your key roles & responsibilities include:

·        In charge of operation planning and management in Asia-Pacific regions.

·        Promote and lead the project to implement ISO related system and Other regional system implementation.

·        Promote business consignment to outsourcing subsidiary in India to adapt to enlarge the capacity and low cost operation.

·        Establish a plan to develop core operation member in Asia regions and promote the education.

·        Lead the Provide solution to branches in order to improve operational efficiency.

·        Preparing and presenting management including board members in both English and Japanese language.

·        Enhancing each Asia-Pacific branch operation based on risk control framework together with HO and other stakeholders.

What you should have:

  • At least 15 years of experience in banking and an intimate knowledge of banking operations and systems infrastructure.

·        Prior experience of operations planning, enhance operational excellence PJ, in a managerial/leadership position in financial institution is required.

·        Expertise in analysis of banking operation processes and operational errors, creation of banking operation procedure and planning of business continuity management will be strongly encouraged.

·        Experience in system integration and deployment in Asian countries will be strongly encouraged.

·        Good problem-solving skills and the ability to acquire consensus among stakeholders.

·        Willing to travel for business trips to branch offices on demand basis.

·        Business-level proficiency in both English and Japanese is mandatory as the incumbent is expected to read & understand documents as well as respond, communicate and lead a meeting with project members including board members in Tokyo (Head Office) in these two languages.

postedCompany.description:
Mizuho Bank, Ltd. is a subsidiary of the Japan-based Mizuho Financial Group, Inc. (listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and NYSE) and is one of the largest financial services companies in the world. Mizuho Bank, Ltd. provides financial and strategic solutions for the increasingly diverse and sophisticated needs of its clients with offices located in all the major cities of the world such as Tokyo, New York, London, Hong Kong and Singapore.

Join Mizuho Bank, Ltd., in Singapore, and be part of our expanding team, passionate to build the future together.
postedCompany.name: MIZUHO BANK, LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
